scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/web && npm run build --workspace apps/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace apps/web && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace apps/mobile

comments.overrides: Pin the whole Metro family to 0.81.x (RN 0.76 / Expo SDK 52). A leftover from the SDK 54 experiment left Metro 0.83.7 in the lockfile; SDK 52's @expo/cli does require('metro/src/lib/TerminalReporter'), a path Metro 0.83 removed, so the EAS 'Bundle JavaScript' phase crashed. This forces every transitive Metro back to the SDK-52-compatible line.
